zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Keynes於1425年出生在英國戴文文可利時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Keynes20歲，母親Maud Moleyns30歲。她於大約1444年與Richard Chichester結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在英國戴文維德沃希享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Keynes于1425年出生在英国戴文文可利时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Keynes20岁，母亲Maud Moleyns30岁。她于大约1444年与Richard Chichester结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在英国戴文維德沃希享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Keynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Caines
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cahaignes in Eure, France, or Cahaynes in Calvados, France, both probably named with a Celtic element meaning ‘juniper bush’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Keynes was born in 1425, in Winkleigh, Devon, England, her father, Sir Nicholas Keynes, was 20 and her mother, Maud Moleyns, was 30. She married Richard Chichester about 1444. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1460, in Widworthy, Devon, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Keynes est née en 1425, à Winkleigh, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Keynes, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Maud Moleyns, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Chichester environ 1444. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Widworthy, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Keynes 1425 in Winkleigh, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Keynes 20 und ihre Mutter Maud Moleyns 30. Sie hat um 1444 Richard Chichester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Widworthy, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Keynes è nata il nel 1425 nel Winkleigh, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Keynes, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Maud Moleyns, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Richard Chichester circa 1444. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel Widworthy, Devon, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Keynesが1425年にイギリスデボンウィンクレイグで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Keynesは20歳，母Maud Moleynsは30歳であった。約1444年にRichard Chichesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリスデボンウィドウオルシーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Keynes(이)가 1425년 영국 데폰 윈클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Keynes(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Moleyns(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1444년 Richard Chichester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 데폰 위드워시에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Keynes nasceu em 1425, em Winkleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Keynes, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Maud Moleyns, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Chichester aproximadamente 1444. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Keynes родилась в 1425 г. в местности винклиг, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Keynes было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Moleyns, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Chichester около 1444 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности видворти, девон, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Keynes nació en 1425, en Winkleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Keynes, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Maud Moleyns, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Richard Chichester aproximadamente 1444. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1460, en Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
